feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: CPI capabilities "Design, Develop and Operate Integration Scenarios" is missing
entry.content:
Hi expert

I created a trial account in CPI, and I added all collection role to my user already including PI_Integration_Developer,PI_Administrator, and PI_Business_Expert. 

But I still can not see the capability of "Design, Develop and Operate Integration Scenarios".

And I went to "Manage Capability", the "Cloud Integration" there is always shown as in progress with 79%.

Any advise?

 

many thanks

entry.title: userid and pwd are required when trying to connect ADT and ABAP enviroment with service key
entry.content:
Hi experts

when I tried to connect ADT and ABAP enviroment with a downloaded service key,

system always requires me to input user id and pwd.

I dunt know which user id and pwd should I input, or how can I avoid of it.

can anyone help?

Regards

entry.title: SAP Build App subscription failed
entry.content:
Hi fellow members, 

Hope you are doing well.

I am trying to subscribe to SAP Build App in BTP trial account, and I am getting Subscription failed. without getting much error details. 

I followed the manual configuration (https://help.sap.com/docs/BUILD_APPS/431746e4c663458aa68d9754b237bfc6/manual-configuration ) and Booster but the result is same. 

Please advise. 

Thanks in advance

SAP Build SAP Build Apps SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Issue - High Impact
entry.content:
Dear Members,

The Build Apps is now being giving issues from last week.

I was receiving the 403 error so I tried all possible approaches and there was no way to resolve it.

Currently, I deleted the sub account and tried to access the Build Apps with a new Sub Account.

The installation failed, stating unable to subscribe to the SaaS application.

When I opened it in the Subscriptions of the sub account, still it's in the free plan but failing to install the application. Below screenshots would help you to understand the issue in detail.

I had a demo in the coming week and lost everything at the moment. IT would be helpful if someone can provide me a good solution.

Thanks and Regards,

Ananthu RB

entry.title: SAP CAP Node.js - Insert vector embedding data into hana cloud is not working
entry.content:
Hello, everyone,

I referred these two links cap-ai-vector-engine-sample ,cap-llm-plugin-samples  to develop a CAP RAG application.

When I insert the embedding data into the db, I got an error message "argument type mismatch: Result is not a single value".

After my research, I found that if the dependency @SAP/cds-hana is added, data can be inserted into the database successfully, However, my App use Fiori elements and enbaled draft function, if the @SAP/cds-hana dependency is used, my Fiori app will encounter an error: SqlError: invalid column name: DRAFTADMINISTRATIVEDATA.INPROCESSBYUSER. When this dependency is removed, the Fiori app will not report an error, but I won't be able to insert data into the db. It seems that this is a dilemma, So, is there a conflict between @SAP/cds-hana and the draft-enabled function?  And is there any way to insert data into the db normally without using this dependency?

Any advice or suggestions would be appreciated.

schema.cds

entity DocumentChunk : cuid, managed {
    file            : Association to Files;
    text_chunk      : LargeString;
    metadata_column : LargeString;
    embedding       : Vector(1536);
}

service.js ( insert into db )

const embeddingResult = await capllmplugin.getEmbeddingWithConfig(
          embeddingModelConfig,
          chunk.pageContent
        );

embedding = embeddingResult?.data[0]?.embedding;

const entry = {
          file_ID: uuid,
          text_chunk: chunk.pageContent,
          metadata_column: fileName,
          embedding: array2VectorBuffer(embedding),
        };
textChunkEntries.push(entry);

// Insert the text chunk with embeddings into db
      const insertStatus = await INSERT.into(DocumentChunk).entries(
        textChunkEntries
      );

package.json

 "dependencies": {
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/http-client": "3.25.0",
    "@sap-cloud-sdk/resilience": "3.25.0",
    "@sap/cds": "^8",
    "@cap-js/hana": "^1",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4",
    "cap-llm-plugin": "^1.4.4",
    "express": "^4",
    "langchain": "^0.1.19",
  }

entry.title: I want to make page transitions without setting the layout to TwoColumnsMidExpanded.
entry.content:
Hi,

I have pages "list" and "master" that use TwoColumnsMidExpanded.
I want the transition from page "list" to page "master" to be complete, not TwoColumnsMidExpanded.
When I try to transition using the following source, the URL path changes, but the screen does not change.
Also, I am currently using window.location.reload(); to change the screen display, but I would like to be able to switch the screen without using it if possible.
Is there any way to do this?

Best regards.

controller.js：
onPress: function (evt) {
this._oRouter.navTo("list", {});
window.location.reload();
},

manifest.json：
"routing": {
"config": {
"routerClass": "sap.m.routing.Router",
"viewType": "XML",
"async": true,
"viewPath": "formapplication.view",
"controlAggregation": "pages",
"controlId": "idFlexibleColumnLayout",
"clearControlAggregation": false
},
"routes": [
{
"name": "list",
"pattern": "",
"target": [
"list"
]
},
{
"name": "master",
"pattern": "newForm",
"target": [
"master"
]
},
{
"name": "detail",
"pattern": "detail/{id}/{layout}",
"target": [
"master",
"detail"
]
},
{
"name": "preview",
"pattern": "preview/{layout}",
"target": [
"master",
"detail"
]
}
],
"targets": {
"list": {
"viewName": "FormList",
"viewId": "idFormList",
"controlAggregation": "beginColumnPages"
},
"master": {
"viewName": "Master",
"viewId": "idMaster",
"controlAggregation": "beginColumnPages"
},
"detail": {
"viewName": "Detail",
"viewId": "idDetail",
"controlAggregation": "midColumnPages"
}
}
},

entry.title: How to pass dynamic value through a mdk Extension code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement in SSAM 2405 where we need to pass a dynamic image as a Base64 string between MDK and an Extension (both ways).

Scenario:
I trigger an MDK extension from MDK, which opens the extension page. At some point inside the extension, I need to use an MDK action to trigger a customized Document Editor to edit an image using this Base64 String. The image needs to be passed from the extension to MDK for editing. After editing, the modified image must be passed back from MDK to the extension.

Can you please suggest and help me to achieve this?

Regards,

Divan Wellalage

entry.title: SAP BTP : Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: When I try to start the SAP Build App using Booster option, below error is coming.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Free Trial Account - Subscription Failed
entry.content:
Hello All,

I just created a free trial on SAP BTP, when I followed the steps "Create an Application with SAP Build Apps", I find that status of SAP Build Apps "failed"

entry.title: There is a wrong when create a SAP Build Apps.
how to connect to ibm db2 as400 iseries using jt400.jar
entry.content:
Hi,

we connected to mssql on-premise through sap btp connectivity service using our implemented class for socks5 but we want to connect to ibm db2 as400 iseries but it only support "property.ssl-socket-factory" with port 9471,
can we connect to it or can't ?
(not iflow's jdbc adaptor)

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BTP Solution Diagrams for Confluence Gliffy
entry.content:
Hi all,

currently there is draw.io, Lucidchart and Powerpoint supported, see https://sap.github.io/btp-solution-diagrams/

As draw.io seems quite closely related to Gliffy (there are importers from draw.io into Gliffy and from Gliffy into draw.io), I was wondering if there is planned support for (Confluence) Gliffy, too?

Cheers

J

entry.title: OData V4 Error.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where I'm making OData V4 POST call to S4HANA with standard OData api_safetydatasheetassessment. Now there is an extension to this API i.e SAP__self.UpdateSafetyDataSheetDocumentDetails which I'm providing manually because not getting this in Select Entity & Define Operations (attaching SS).

 

When I'm deploying the interface, I'm getting below error.

If anyone has worked on Product Compliance interfaces, please help me on this.

Please suggest some solution for this.


P.S : Already tried converting JSON to XML.
Also tried with HTTP adapter.  

 

Thanks in advance!! 😊

 


SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries   SAP BTP, ABAP environment   SAP Integration Suite   Cloud Integration   SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: SBPA: Integrate different projects in visibility dashboard
entry.content:
Dear community, 

Let me first describe some context: 

  • I have 5 projects which all have one or multiple business processes. 
  • A launchpad is set up to start the business processes and see tasks in the Inbox App

My question now is:
How to set up and configure a visibility scenario dashboard without doing so for each project individually? 
Why do I want this?
I'd like to avoid to configure and maintain

  1. a visibility scenario per project
  2. multiple tiles for each visibility scenario dashboard in the launchpad.

My thoughts were to create a new project exclusively for this visibility scenario, where I import the said projects as an dependency. Unfortunately, I get the error stating: "The operation could not be performed due to missing permission.". 

Could somebody share their thoughts on this?
Why do I get the error "Acces denied"? And if there exists a workaround to integrate all business processes in one (1) dashboard.

Looking forward to your feedback. 
C.

entry.title: Connectivity Proxy Upgrade to 2.13.0
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an issue while i'm trying to upgrade my connectivity proxy to version 2.13.0. This is what i get from the logs before it reaches ERROR state:

Starting Connectivity Proxy *                                                                                                                                                                            │
│ connectivity-proxy **************************************************************                                                                                                                                                                            │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.308                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity_proxy.tunnel.server.host=test.com                                  │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.310                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity_proxy.tunnel.server.port=443                                                                 │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.310                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity.agent.version=2.518.0                                                                        │
│ connectivity-proxy 2025-02-28 09:17:40.310                      main             INFO K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter:110 - Validated system property connectivity_proxy.image.version=2.13.0                                                                   │
│ connectivity-proxy Exception in thread "main" java.lang.IllegalStateException: Missing or empty mandatory system property with key: connectivity_proxy.region_configurations.file                                                                            │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.spi.environment.SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.getMandatoryProperty(SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.java:103)                                                                                                 │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.spi.environment.SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.assertEnvironment(SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.java:79)                                                                                                     │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.spi.environment.SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(SystemEnvironmentInterpreter.java:31)                                                                                                                │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.server.proxy.ConnectivityAgentEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(ConnectivityAgentEnvironmentInterpreter.java:16)                                                                                      │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.AbstractK8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(AbstractK8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:52)                                                                                     │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:131)                                                                                                    │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:126)                                                                                                    │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.environment.K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.<init>(K8sScpEnvironmentInterpreter.java:122)                                                                                                    │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.K8sScpConnectivityAgent.<init>(K8sScpConnectivityAgent.java:67)                                                                                                                           │
│ connectivity-proxy     at com.sap.core.connectivity.tunnel.k8s.scp.K8sScpConnectivityAgent.<init>(K8sScpConnectivityAgent.java:6

entry.title: Is there a way to get ABAP Usage data like SCMON for BTP ABAP Environment?
entry.content:
For on-premise system we use SCMON / UPL to log the usage of ABAP code. This helps in analysing the code for migration or decommissioning.

Is there any way to get similar usage data for SAP BTP, ABAP environment in the same system or via Cloud ALM?

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Workzone - is it possible to merge content from different channels?
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't think this is possible but maybe I missed something on the documentation. Say you have a workzone instance (standard) with multiple channels configured (e.g. S/4 HANA and business solutions), and they contribute pages with the same names. Is it possible to merge them instead of having a duplication of tabs with the same name ?

 

Thanks in advance

 

@Vera_Gutbrod @ThomasReiss

entry.title: Media content field value disappeared after draftActivate
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I created an entity with media and draft feature activated. 

entity Files : cuid, managed {
    category    : String;
    fileName    : String;
    size        : String;

    
    mediaType   : String @Core.IsMediaType;
    isGenerated : Boolean;

    @Core.MediaType  : mediaType  @Core.ContentDisposition.Filename: fileName
    fileContent : LargeBinary;
    knowledges  : Composition of many Knowledges
                      on knowledges.file = $self;
}
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity Files            as projection on ai.Files


The problem is Media content field "fileContent" value disappeared after draftActivate action , is there a bug in SAP CAP?
before draftActivateafter draftActivate

entry.title: Inquiry on SAP Solution for e-Invoicing Compliance in Europe (Including Hungary)
entry.content:
Dear,
 
We are currently looking for a technical solution to comply with various e-invoicing regulations across Europe, including Hungary’s NAV Online Számla. Our company is using SAP S/4HANA and BTP services(Integration Suite, CF Runtime, HANA Cloud..etc), and we need to ensure seamless integration between our ERP system and different tax authorities across the EU.
 
Could you please provide guidance on:
1. The recommended SAP solution for e-invoicing compliance in Europe (e.g., SAP Document Compliance, SAP Integration Suite, or API-based integration).
2. Standard SAP APIs available for submitting e-invoices to different tax authorities (e.g., NAV Online Számla in Hungary, SDI in Italy, Chorus Pro in France, etc.).
3. Required configurations in SAP S/4HANA to generate e-invoices compliant with EU standards (e.g., XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, Peppol).
4. Relevant SAP Notes, documentation, or best practices for multi-country e-invoicing implementation.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Best Regards

entry.title: ToolbarItem color not changing even after applying style in SAP MDK 24.11.2-002
entry.content:
In the previous version the below style was working as expected. With new version the toolbarItem color is not changing.
 
in Styles 
#BulkApproveToolbarItem {
color: #188918;
}

"ToolBar": {
"Items": [
{
"_Type": "Control.Type.ToolbarItem",
"_Name": "BulkApproveToolbarItem",
"Caption": "BulkApprove",
"Enabled": true,
"Clickable": true,
"Visible": true
}
]
}

Please guide to resolve this issue.
